title: FAIR Annotations Vocabulary Meta-Schema
description: Defines the syntax of custom FAIR annotation keywords. These keywords are silently ignored by standard validators (Mechanism 1: Custom Annotations) but carry machine-actionable metadata for FAIR-aware tools.

oneOf.description: Language-tagged string map, keys are BCP-47 language tags.

i18nText.title: Text
i18nText.description: A rich text string or a language-tagged map of rich text strings (Markdown supported).

examples.fr:
### Aperçu
Ce jeu de données contient...

markdownText.description: A string containing Markdown-formatted rich text.

uriOrCurie.description: A URI or a CURIE (prefix:localname) referencing a concept in a controlled vocabulary.

fair:conceptRef.title: Concept Reference
fair:conceptRef.description: URI or CURIE of the statistical or semantic concept this property represents.

fair:concept.title: Concept Literal
fair:concept.description: Human-readable name of the semantic concept (e.g. 'Population', 'Gross Domestic Product').

fair:label.title: Label
fair:label.description: Generic human-readable label for this property in the current context (e.g. 'Total Inhabitants', 'GDP at Market Prices').

fair:provider.title: Data Provider (Literal)
fair:provider.description: Human-readable name of the providing organization or person.

fair:providerRef.title: Data Provider Reference
fair:providerRef.description: URI of the organization or person (e.g., ROR, ORCID).

fair:license.title: License (Literal)
fair:license.description: Human-readable license name or short text.

fair:licenseRef.title: License Reference
fair:licenseRef.description: URI of the license (e.g., Creative Commons, OGL).

fair:unitRef.title: Unit of Measure Reference
fair:unitRef.description: URI or CURIE referencing a controlled vocabulary for units (e.g., QUDT).

fair:quantity.title: Quantity (Literal)
fair:quantity.description: Human-readable name of the quantity kind (e.g. 'Length', 'Mass', 'Velocity').

fair:quantityRef.title: Quantity Reference
fair:quantityRef.description: URI or CURIE referencing a metrology ontology for quantities (e.g., VIM, QUDT quantity kinds).

fair:temporalCoverage.title: Temporal Coverage
fair:temporalCoverage.description: Time period covered, including a descriptive name and/or structured dates.

description.description: Human-readable description for the time period (e.g. 'Fiscal Year 2023').

start.description: Start date of the coverage period.

end.description: End date of the coverage period.

fair:temporalCoverageRef.title: Temporal Coverage Reference
fair:temporalCoverageRef.description: URI or CURIE referencing a standardized time period.

fair:spatialCoverageRef.title: Spatial Coverage Reference
fair:spatialCoverageRef.description: URI or CURIE identifying the geographic area in a gazetteer (e.g., GeoNames, Wikidata).

fair:classification.title: Classifications
fair:classification.description: List of classification system entries that categorize this property.
